Query.Sql: CREATE TABLE `merchant_settings` ( `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `merchant_id` bigint unsigned, `label` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `setting_value` text, `description` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `setting_group` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `unique_merchant_setting_name` (`merchant_id`,`name`), FOREIGN KEY (`merchant_id`) REFERENCES `merchants`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB
